title: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, July 07 2021
section_path: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, July 07 2021
section_path_text: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, July 07 2021
summary:
Main
Very little period activity reported in the crude sector once again as the market remained subdued. Little to report in the clean market aside from a few MR fixtures to report.
